title: BloodWorks
description: Explore Dark Blood magic and become a... Blood Bonded soul.
body:
Explore Dark Blood magic and become a... Blood Bonded soul.

A Blood Bonded Soul has the Power to Control blood at will you will be able to at first shoot blood bolts but will later be able to master more powerful abilities such as Blood rain and Blood Cripple.

To become Blood Bonded you will ned to find and Obtain a Hemoglobe this is will power the Sanguine altar

Enhance these Blood abilities and fight Disturbing creatures such as the hemogoblin and the Blood Blob



Blood Bonded

Power 1 - Blood Shoot Key Bind = G this ability now has the power to be upgraded at the sanguine altar.

It may Start as a disgusting blob of blood But when upgraded you will unlock the powerful slash ability

Update 1.5 Has added a new dark biome, a new mod and a powerful upgrade system.

Shadow Magic:

Power 1 - Shadow Dash - Key Bind = x

Once upgraded you will be able to use while in the sun
